title: Wilderness Lodges India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Wilderness Lodges India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Wilderness Lodges India are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Indore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Wilderness Lodges India:
Wilderness Lodges India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wilderness Lodges India!
